overview: A full-featured admin dashboard for managing a 200-member business referral club across 5 chapters. Track member profiles with business details, chapter attendance, referrals given and received, and send broadcast messages to all members or specific chapters.
features: Member directory with business profiles and chapter assignment
Attendance tracking per meeting with history per member
Referral logging — track referrals given and received with deal status
Broadcast messaging to all members or by chapter
Dashboard overview with member count, upcoming meetings, and quick stats
Admin login with Internet Identity for secure access
